channel.title: Tech Insights
channel.description: Daily curated news on AI, developer tools, and the tech industry

item.title: Plex is down
item.description: Plex services have been experiencing some major issues today, with multiple users reporting problems on Plex's forums and on Reddit. Many people use Plex as a way to stream shows and movies they...

item.title: Nintendo’s Switch 2 bundle that includes a game is $50 off
item.description: Discounts on the Nintendo Switch 2 are rare, but they do happen on occasion. There’s one happening now, actually, on the company’s $499.99 console bundle that includes a digital game (Mario Kart...

item.title: Meta accused of using biased AI targeting for mass layoffs
item.description: A group of 26 former Meta employees is suing the company over claims that it used AI tools to unfairly target workers on leave with layoffs, as reported earlier by Reuters. In the lawsuit, the...

item.title: Como o brtech implementa anonimato de verdade: a arquitetura de privacidade por tras dos relatos
item.description: Se eu sofrer um ataque e dumparem o banco de dados do brtech, o que o invasor encontra? Hashes irreversiveis. Nomes aleatorios. Tokens nulos. Zero emails. Zero IPs. Zero user agents. Nao e "confia...

item.title: Turla Upgrades Kazuar Backdoor Into Modular P2P Botnet
item.description: What Happened On May 14, 2026, Microsoft's Security Blog published a detailed analysis of Kazuar — a backdoor operated by Turla (also known as Secret Blizzard, Venomous Bear, and Waterbug), a...

item.title: Hi everyone! 👋 I'm on a journey to become a DevOps engineer, and my goal is to land my first DevOps role by this time next year. I'm committed to learning and growing every day. Any words of encouragement or advice would mean a lot. 🙏
I wasted a weekend on WSL2 browser automation so you don’t have to
item.description: If you want browser automation on Windows that actually survives contact with reality, treat WSL2 networking as the first problem. Not Playwright. Not OpenClaw. Not your prompts. The fastest demo...

item.title: AI Can Migrate Your COBOL to Java. It Can't Prove It Didn't Break Anything. We Built the Part That Does.
item.description: Every bank, insurer, and government system running on a mainframe today is sitting on COBOL that nobody wants to touch and nobody can afford to leave alone. AI coding agents have made the...

item.title: You Don't Need Perfect Code - You Need a Safety Net That Talks Back
item.description: TL;DR — My last post was about catching drift: the moment my config tool's idea of "valid" silently diverges from the real Pyxel framework. This post is about the other half of the same system —...

item.title: "How Discord Timestamps Work — A Complete Guide"
item.description: How Discord Timestamps Work — A Complete Guide If you've ever seen a message in Discord that says "3 hours ago" or "Tomorrow at 9:00 AM" and wondered how it stays accurate no matter who's reading...

item.title: Did You Know? Mapbox Geocoding API Lets You Filter by Feature Type
item.description: Episode 1: Geocoding smarter, not harder This one's about the types parameter on the Mapbox Geocoding API specifically. (The Search Box API has its own types parameter too, but that's a separate...

item.title: Kontigo (YC S24) Is Hiring (Head of Security)
item.description: Article URL: https://www.ycombinator.com/companies/kontigo/jobs/uNttrlv-head-of-security Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48909820 Points: 0 # Comments: 0

item.title: Image SEO untuk Galeri Portofolio Proyek: Sitemap, Structured Data, dan Penamaan File
item.description: Selama tiga tahun terakhir saya menangani website bisnis lintas industri, satu pola terus berulang: galeri foto proyek adalah aset paling mahal yang paling diabaikan. Ratusan foto lapangan...

item.title: Boston Dynamics tries using ‘robot dogs’ for deliveries
item.description: Boston Dynamics' robotic quadruped Spot has already found work doing routine factory inspections and patrolling the ruins of Pompeii, but what about deliveries? The company is testing a new...

item.title: LabubaRAT Masquerades as NVIDIA Software to Control Windows Hosts
item.description: Cybersecurity researchers have flagged a previously undocumented Rust-based remote access trojan (RAT) codenamed LabubaRAT that masquerades as NVIDIA software to blend into target environments....

item.title: Sony delays its new PS5 fight stick
item.description: Sony is delaying the launch of its FlexStrike fight stick controller for PS5 and PC, which had been set to launch on August 6th, to an unspecified date in the future. The company blames the...

item.title: Nomad’s high-end phone accessories are up to 30 percent off
item.description: Premium phone accessory maker Nomad is celebrating its anniversary with discounts on its entire catalog of products. The sale will knocks off up to thirty percent off usual prices and will run...

item.title: Meta’s Adam Mosseri says AI token budgets could soon be capped per engineer
item.description: Instagram head Adam Mosseri believes companies will eventually need to manage AI token spending the same way they manage payroll or other operating expenses, predicting that engineers could soon...

item.title: The OLED Xbox Ally X20 is so good, Asus will sell it solo
item.description: When I first told you about the "OLED Xbox Ally X of my dreams," I had to curb my enthusiasm a bit. That's partly because I hadn't yet tried the handheld myself, and partly because Asus was only...

item.title: YouTube and X Have Become ‘Gateways’ to Nudify Apps
item.description: A new study found that social media platforms are referring people to sites where they can create nonconsensual, sexually explicit deepfakes for as little as $1 an image.

item.title: Upcoming Speaking Engagements
item.description: This is a current list of where and when I am scheduled to speak: I’m speaking (virtually) at the Policy-Relevant Privacy Research Workshop in Calgary, Canada, on Monday, July 20, 2026. I’m...

item.title: Google Images gets a Pinterest-like redesign focused on discovery
item.description: Now, when users navigate to Google Images, they'll see a "For You" gallery of images tailored to their interests and browsing history.

item.title: Celebrating 25 years of visual search innovation
item.description: Google Images logo surrounded by illustrations of people searching for different images

item.title: The Google Images homepage will recommend photos even before you search
item.description: Google is announcing a big change to the Google Images homepage in honor of the platform's 25th anniversary this week. Instead of a mostly blank page with a search bar, the homepage will soon show...

item.title: Spotify is now an AI chatbot, too
item.description: Spotify is experimenting with a new AI feature that allows Premium subscribers to play and explore music, audiobooks, and podcasts by having conversations with a chatbot. The "Talk to Spotify"...

item.title: X admits its broken algorithm made the site feel like a ‘battleground’
item.description: X's head of product, Nikita Bier, admitted in a post on Monday that X's algorithm was "missing" data about surfacing posts from people who you've followed back. Now, he says a tweak will "boost...

item.title: New York State halts construction of all new data centers
item.description: New York has become the first state to temporarily halt approval of large data centers, as Gov. Kathy Hochul argues the AI-driven building boom shouldn’t come at the expense of higher electricity...

item.title: Reflection inks $1B compute deal with Nebius
item.description: Reflection AI has signed a $1 billion deal to access Nebius' compute. Reflection was founded in 2024 and is developing open source AI technology.

item.title: The real AI race may no longer be at the frontier
item.description: Hugging Face CEO Clem Delangue says enterprises increasingly want open models, due to cost, accessibility, and ownership. Do frontier models still matter if most production AI ends up running on...

item.title: Spotify expands its AI push with a ChatGPT-like music assistant
item.description: Spotify is rolling out a new AI-powered conversational feature that lets Premium subscribers chat with the app to discover music, podcasts, audiobooks, and more.
